methodology.wrapper_binary_detection: A binary is treated as Reflexive wrapper code if it contains any of: ReflexiveArcade DLL Signature, radll_GetDLLVersionAsInt, radll_Initialize, or the standard ReflexiveArcade.dll load-error string.
methodology.build_string_detection: Build numbers are only accepted from standalone null-terminated ASCII strings of the form 'Build NNN'.
methodology.dll_major_version_source: DLL major versions are assigned by matching ReflexiveArcade.dll .text/.data section hashes to the four families whose radll_GetDLLVersionAsInt exports were verified in Binja.
